column1: I had_______a bad time in prison that I never want to go there again.
One problem is that we don't have__________officers on the streets.
I can't get a car yet because I'm not________to drive.
Some crimes seem to be________in this country than in others.
My grandma says there was________a lot of crime when she was young that nobody trusted anybody else.
It became_________as I walked home and I began to get slightly nervous.
